title: Our Team
subtitle: Meet the experts behind CEC Nepal's success

joinTeam.title: Join Our Team
joinTeam.description: We're always looking for talented engineers and consultants passionate about clean energy.

members.name: Mr. Mani Raj Dahal
members.education: MSc Hydraulic Engineering & River Basin Development (IHE Delft, Netherlands), BE Civil Engineering (IOE Pulchowk)

experience.more_info: Technical consultant for numerous hydropower projects

members.bio: Founder and Director of Clean Energy Consultants Pvt. Ltd., one of Nepal's leading hydropower consultancy firms with extensive expertise in hydropower development and technical consultancy.

members.name: Er. Santosh Dhakal

experience.more_info: Electrical Engineer and Electromechanical Expert at CEC, 60+ hydropower projects designed

members.bio: Board Director at Clean Energy Consultants since mid-2006. Has led the electrical and electromechanical design for approximately 60 hydropower projects with several more under feasibility and detailed design stages. Currently working with Hydro Tasmania, Australia.

members.name: Mr. Narayan Poudel

experience.more_info: Extensive professional experience in finance and project financial analysis

members.bio: Finance Director at Clean Energy Consultants Pvt. Ltd. Leads financial feasibility studies, project financial analysis, and overall financial assessment for hydropower projects. Also serves as Finance Director for Aayu Entertainment Pvt. Ltd. and Chairman of Finman Services Pvt. Ltd.

members.name: Er. Kosa Raj Chapagain

experience.more_info: Senior Civil Engineer and Project Manager at CEC

members.bio: Project Director and Board Member at Clean Energy Consultants since mid-2011. Brings extensive expertise in feasibility studies, detailed design, and project monitoring. Responsible for overseeing major hydropower project implementations and technical delivery.

meta.expert_staff: Cost and Construction Quality Control Expert

members.name: Dr. Chhatra Basnet
members.education: PhD Rock Mechanics (NTNU Norway), MSc Hydropower Development (NTNU Norway), BE Civil (IOE Pulchowk)

experience.more_info: Clean Energy Consultants Pvt. Ltd., strategic leadership and innovation

members.bio: Chief Executive Officer with 18 years of pivotal experience at Clean Energy Consultants Pvt. Ltd. Dr. Basnet has shaped the company's strategic direction, driving innovation and sustainable engineering practices in the hydropower sector. Leads organizational vision and technical excellence.

members.name: Dr. Bishnu Raj Baral
members.education: PhD Sediment (QMUL, UK), MSc Hydraulic Engineering and Sediment Transport (IHE Delft, Netherlands), BE Civil (IOE, Pulchowk)

experience.more_info: 5 years international research (UK, Italy, Netherlands), 18+ years hydropower consulting

members.name: Mr. Ghan Bahadur Shrestha

experience.more_info: Major national projects: Nalsing Gad (410 MW), Melamchi Water Supply, Kabeli-3 (49 MW), Upper Chameliya (40 MW)

members.bio: Geological and geophysical expert with specialized expertise in geological mapping, geophysical surveys, drilling supervision, GIS, and remote sensing. Extensive experience on significant national hydropower projects. Brings critical earth science expertise to complex feasibility and design phases.

meta.expert_staff: Sr. Geologist / RS & GIS / Tunneling & Geophysics Expert

members.name: Er. Dinesh Silwal
members.education: BE Civil Engineering, PU, MSc, Construction Mgmt, PU
members.bio: 15+ years of experience in Hydropower, A Hydropower construction professional specializing in project planning, design, tunneling, surface construction, electro-mechanical installation, quality control, and successful execution of multiple Hydropower projects.

members.name: Er. Prajwal Khatiwada
members.bio: Electrical Engineer with 6+ years of professional experience, including 4+ years in the hydropower sector, comprising 1 year in power plant operation and maintenance and 3+ years in hydropower, substation, and transmission line design, drafting, technical documentation, supervision, and testing of electromechanical equipment.

members.name: Er. Prajwal Poudel
members.education: BE Civil Engineering, TU, ME Hydropower Engineering, TU
members.bio: 8+ years of experience in the hydropower sector, specializing in planning,hydrological study and feasibility studies. Serving clients at CEC since 2018

members.bio: 6+ Years of Experience in Geological field- Geological and Geotechnical investigation, Geological mapping, Construction supervision and monitering and Design coordination. Currently serving at CEC since 2021, contributing to the study, design and execution of hydropower projects.

members.bio: 9+ Years of Experience in Hydropower Development — encompassing project planning, design coordination, construction management, and site supervision. Currently serving at CEC since 2022, contributing to the execution and oversight of hydropower infrastructure projects.

members.bio: 1 Year+ in Road  Sector, 5 years + in Hydropower Sector ( Engaged in preparation of Feasibility Report of Gulangdi Khola small Hydropower Project,  Enagaged  in Site Supervision, design/technical coordination and full construction works  of Setikhola Hydropower project (22MW) from  project Commencement to  Completion). Associated with CEC since 2021, currently contributing design and planning of Upper Marsyangdhhi (102 MW).

members.bio: CAD Engineer with 10+ years of experience in the hydropower sector and over 28 years of professional drafting experience. Currently serving at CEC since 2015.

members.bio: 10+ years of experience in civil and structural engineering across hydropower, urban development and reconstruction sectors.

members.bio: Civil Engineer with 7+ years of professional experience, including 2+ years in the hydropower sector involving project pre-feasibility and feasibility studies, design coordination, construction management, implementation, execution, and site supervision since joining CEC in 2024. Experienced in tunnel and underground hydropower works, including excavation, primary support systems, software-based modeling, stress analysis, and optimization of underground and slope protection structures.

members.bio: 2+ years of experience in the geology profession, covering geological field mapping, geotechnical investigations, and construction supervision and monitoring. Involved in the planning and execution of hydropower projects at CEC since 2022, covering activities from pre-feasibility studies and detailed investigations to construction implementation and project execution.

members.bio: 2 + years  experiance igeological and geotechnical investigation for hydropower projects, contibuting to geological drawing, report writing, core logging. Currently serving at CEC  since 2024.

members.bio: 1 year + of Experience in the Hydropower sector, contributing to feasibility studies, technical documentation and infrastructure planning including cost estimation.

members.name: Lokendra Raj Bhatta
members.bio: 10+ Years of Experience in Hydropower Construction — Involving project planning, construction and site supervision. Currently serving at CEC since 2024, contributing to the execution and supervision of Upper kabeli hydropower projects.

members.name: Aasish Neupane
members.bio: Experienced Survey Engineer and Technical Land Surveyor with over 12+ years of practical experience in hydropower, tunnel, road, and transportation infrastructure projects across Nepal. Skilled in GPS and Total Station operation, traverse surveying, tunnel alignment, topographic surveys, cadastral mapping, coordinate calculations, and quantity estimation. Strong background in survey planning, construction layout, site supervision, and quality control for hydropower plants, underground tunnels, roads, and other civil infrastructure works. Worked closely with multidisciplinary construction and consulting teams, contributing to project coordination, technical decision-making, and accurate survey data management to support efficient and successful project delivery. Currently in CEC since 2026

members.name: Prem Shrestha
members.bio: Hydropower & HM Professional with 5+ years of experience in hydropower projects and 8+ years of expertise in NDT inspection and quality control. Skilled in supervision of penstock fabrication & installation, branch pipe and bifurcation works, gate installation, welding supervision, hydro stat pressure testing, UT/MT/PT/RT inspection, IPC verification.

Ltd. in 2024 AD, has actively contributed to site activity oversight, quality assurance, construction coordination across hydropower projects.
